hooks.command:
PIDFILE="$HOME/.cache/better-robotics-hubd.pid"
mkdir -p "$HOME/.cache"
[ -L "$PIDFILE" ] && rm -f "$PIDFILE"
if ! curl -sf -m 0.3 http://localhost:8000/fleet 2>/dev/null | jq -e '.robots' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  nohup "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/pi/target/release/hubd" >"$HOME/.cache/hubd.log" 2>&1 &
  echo $! > "$PIDFILE"
  disown
fi

PIDFILE="$HOME/.cache/better-robotics-hubd.pid"
if [ -f "$PIDFILE" ] && [ ! -L "$PIDFILE" ]; then
  pid=$(cat "$PIDFILE")
  if [ -n "$pid" ] && [ "$(ps -p "$pid" -o ucomm= 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ')" = "hubd" ]; then
    kill "$pid"
  fi
  rm -f "$PIDFILE"
fi
